series_metadata.series_description: Retain hard copy records until informatin is entered onto a computer data base system, then destroy hard copy records. Maintain machine readable records until information is superseded by new information or until records series is no longer created, then

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records information is superseded by new information or records series is no longer created ; Paper: hard copy records information is entered onto a computer data base system
